stories.original_summary: A newly identified ichthyosaur from the UK’s Jurassic Coast is rewriting part of the prehistoric playbook. Nicknamed the “Sword Dragon of Dorset,” the three-meter-long marine reptile lived during a poorly understood window of evolution when major ichthyosaur groups were disappearing and new ones eme
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Sea Dragon Bones Unearth Lost Lore!
stories.fantasy_story: Along the ancient shores of the Western Isles, Royal Scholars unearthed the colossal bones of a creature nicknamed the 'Sword Dragon.' This three-meter-long beast once swam the deep seas eons ago. Its discovery rewrites the scrolls of ancient marine beasts, revealing secrets of a forgotten era when old species vanished and new ones emerged.

stories.original_headline: Can solar storms trigger earthquakes? Scientists propose surprising link
stories.original_summary: Scientists have proposed a surprising connection between solar flares and earthquakes. When solar activity disturbs the ionosphere, it may generate electric fields that penetrate fragile fracture zones in Earth’s crust. If a fault is already critically stressed, this extra electrostatic pressure cou
stories.fantasy_headline: Sky-Gazers Link Sun's Temper to Earth's Tremors!
stories.fantasy_story: Grand Wizards and Sky-Gazers propose a startling connection between the sun's fiery temper and the earth's shudders. When celestial disturbances stir the sky's veil, arcane energies might penetrate deep earth veins. This extra pressure could trigger great ground shifts where the earth is already strained, leading to unexpected tremors.

stories.original_headline: YouTube’s cheaper subscription is getting background play and downloads
stories.original_summary: YouTube is adding background playback and offline downloads to YouTube Premium Lite, its $7.99-per-month subscription. With the change, you'll be able to keep YouTube videos going while you use another app on your phone or save videos to watch when you're offline. YouTube Premium Lite came to the US
stories.fantasy_headline: Scrying Pool Guild Offers New Portable Viewing Charms!
stories.fantasy_story: The Scrying Pool Guild now offers new enchantments for its patrons of the 'Lite' tier, requiring only eight silver coins per moon cycle. Now, tales can whisper from your personal scrying orb even as you focus on other tasks. You can also store entire chronicles within your enchanted locket, ready to be viewed even far from the Guild's Grand Crystal.
